words.definition: used to refer to two things or people together
words.example: Both Tonino and Benvenuto were excited.
words.exampleText: Both Tonino and Benvenuto were excited.

words.definition: a male child or young man
words.example: The boy looked at the cathedral.
words.exampleText: The boy looked at the cathedral.

words.definition: a small domesticated carnivorous mammal
words.example: Benvenuto is a special cat.
words.exampleText: Benvenuto is a special cat.

words.definition: a piece or segment of something
words.example: A part of the Italian States was special.
words.exampleText: A part of the Italian States was special.

words.definition: better, greater, or otherwise different from what is usual
words.example: Caprona was a special place.
words.exampleText: Caprona was a special place.

words.definition: inspiring delight or admiration
words.example: Tonino thought it was wonderful.
words.exampleText: Tonino thought it was wonderful.

words.definition: to direct your eyes in a particular direction
words.example: Tonino looked across at the cathedral.
words.exampleText: Tonino looked across at the cathedral.

words.definition: extremely large in size, quantity, or extent
words.example: The cathedral had huge marble domes.
words.exampleText: The cathedral had huge marble domes.

words.definition: a type of hard, smooth stone used in buildings and statues
words.example: The domes were made of marble.
words.exampleText: The domes were made of marble.

words.definition: a rounded vault forming the roof of a building or structure
words.example: The cathedral domes were high.
words.exampleText: The cathedral domes were high.

words.definition: to rest or move on or near the surface of a liquid without sinking; to move smoothly and lightly
words.example: The building seemed to float above the houses.
words.exampleText: The building seemed to float above the houses.

words.definition: made of gold or having the colour of gold
words.example: A golden angel stood on the dome.
words.exampleText: A golden angel stood on the dome.

words.definition: a spiritual being believed to act as a messenger of God
words.example: The angel held a golden scroll.
words.exampleText: The angel held a golden scroll.

words.definition: an object, quality, or event that indicates something
words.example: The angel was a sign of safety.
words.exampleText: The angel was a sign of safety.

words.definition: protected from danger or harm
words.example: Caprona would be safe as long as the angel's song was sung.
words.exampleText: Caprona would be safe as long as the angel's song was sung.

words.definition: the ability to do something or act in a particular way
words.example: The scroll had the power to banish the White Devil.
words.exampleText: The scroll had the power to banish the White Devil.

words.definition: to send someone away from a place and forbid to return
words.example: The White Devil was banished from Caprona.
words.exampleText: The White Devil was banished from Caprona.

words.definition: an evil spirit or demon
words.example: The White Devil tried to get into the city.
words.exampleText: The White Devil tried to get into the city.

words.definition: very unhappy or uncomfortable
words.example: Tonino felt misery at school.
words.exampleText: Tonino felt misery at school.

words.definition: to gain knowledge or skill by studying or experience
words.example: He had to learn the story at school.
words.exampleText: He had to learn the story at school.

words.definition: correctly or satisfactorily
words.example: If you don't do it the right way, you won't learn properly.
words.exampleText: If you don't do it the right way, you won't learn properly.

words.definition: the thick hair covering the skin of an animal
words.example: Benvenuto had matted lumps of fur in his coat.
words.exampleText: Benvenuto had matted lumps of fur in his coat.

words.definition: the outer covering of a mammal, especially its fur; also a piece of clothing
words.example: The cat's coat was dirty.
words.exampleText: The cat's coat was dirty.

words.definition: a flat piece with teeth used for arranging or untangling hair or fur
words.example: He wanted to comb the cat's coat.
words.exampleText: He wanted to comb the cat's coat.

words.definition: a tool with bristles used for cleaning or arranging hair/fur
words.example: A brush was used to clean the fur.
words.exampleText: A brush was used to clean the fur.

words.definition: to take something without permission or legal right
words.example: Tonino planned to steal some veal.
words.exampleText: Tonino planned to steal some veal.

words.definition: to believe that someone is honest or reliable
words.example: She said, 'Trust Benvenuto to have it worked out.'
words.exampleText: She said, 'Trust Benvenuto to have it worked out.'
